Name: Verify expanded cookies view opens from summary banner
Objective: Verify expanded cookies view opens from summary banner
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Step: Launch the Chrome browser in maximized state with resolution 1920 x 1080.
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: Browser is opened in maximized mode.

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Step: Enter URL `https://accounts.creatio.com/login/alm` and launch the application.
Verify cookies consent popup is getting displayed on top of the login page.
Click on the Allow-All button and verify cookies pop-up is closed.
Reload the login page to display cookies popup again.
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: Cookies popup appears on top of login page.

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Step: Click Manage Preferences or equivalent details control on cookies popup.
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: Expanded cookies consent view opens successfully.
